title: Holding It Together: Support Group for Perfectionism & Overwhelm

blocks.hero_title: You look like you're holding everything together. But inside, it feels heavy.
blocks.hero_subtitle: Holding It Together: 6-Week Support Group for Perfectionism & Overwhelm

blocks.body:
You show up for work, for family, for friends. To the outside world, you look high functioning and capable. People rely on you. You're a master at pushing through.

But inside, the emotional load can get overwhelming. The quiet moments are when overwhelm and disconnection hit hardest. Maybe your nervous system is on edge more often than you admit.

You’re not broken, and you’re not alone. This group creates room for that — a place where you don’t have to hold everything by yourself.

blocks.title: Who this group is for:
blocks.body:
* Adults who appear high functioning but feel overwhelmed or numb inside
* People who support everyone else and struggle to receive support themselves
* Those experiencing anxiety, depression, burnout, and/or emotional disconnection
* Anyone tired of feeling alone in their healing and wanting real connection

*This is a trauma-informed, connection-based therapy group that meets in person in Leesburg, Virginia.*

blocks.title: Program Details
blocks.body:
**Duration:** 6-week closed therapy group
**Location:** In person in Leesburg, Virginia
**Format:** 75-minute sessions each week
**Cohort Size:** Small cohort (5 to 6 participants)
**Cost:** $495 full program

items.title: Week 3
items.content: Thoughts, Emotions, and the Inner Critic

blocks.subtitle: Investment
blocks.body:
$495 for the full 6-week journey. This includes weekly, 75-minute sessions, curated materials, and a 15-minute 1:1 screening call.

## This group is NOT for you if you:

* Are dealing with active substance abuse issues
* Are currently in a domestic violence situation
* Are in crisis mode from recent severe trauma
* Struggle with extreme emotional dysregulation that hasn't been addressed
* Tend to dominate conversations and can't tolerate being redirected
* Have significant untreated personality disorder symptoms
* Can't commit to the full 6-week program

*If you're unsure whether this is right for you, we'll determine this together on the screening call.*
